prompt: Create a cinematic ultra-detailed nighttime landscape of a glowing traditional East Asian temple complex beside a still mountain lake. The main subject is a grand multi-tiered pagoda-style palace with ornate curved roofs, carved wooden balconies, layered eaves, and warm golden lantern illumination, positioned slightly right of center. In the left foreground, include a graceful arched stone bridge with three visible arches, lined with continuous golden lights, crossing over reflective water toward the temple. The lake should mirror the temple, bridge, trees, and lanterns in shimmering gold ripples. Behind the architecture, place dramatic jagged snow-covered mountains, tall and sharp, rendered in cold monochrome blue-gray tones under a deep black night sky with no stars. On the right foreground, add a large ancient tree with twisting trunk and dense autumn leaves glowing amber-gold, plus dark rocks along the water’s edge. Add smaller illuminated pavilion rooftops in the midground on both sides to extend the temple grounds. Use a strong contrast between warm gold architecture and foliage versus cold dark mountains and sky, creating a serene sacred atmosphere, high dynamic range, sharp architectural detail, realistic reflections, volumetric glow from lanterns, epic composition, 16:9 wide aspect ratio, no people, no text.
